name: Adrenal Incidentaloma
description: Report template for incidental adrenal lesions identified on imaging performed for other indications

findings.technique: CT [abdomen/chest/CTA] performed for [other clinical indication]. Dedicated adrenal windowing reviewed.
findings.comparison: No prior adrenal imaging available for comparison. [Prior imaging from X date reviewed] - [lesion is new/stable/interval change].
findings.limitations: None - adequate visualization of adrenal glands.

sections.name: Adrenal Lesion
sections.content: Incidental adrenal lesion identified in [right/left] adrenal. Size: [X]cm. Pre-contrast attenuation: [X]HU. Portovenous phase: [X]HU. Delayed (10 min): [X]HU.

sections.name: Characterization
sections.content: Washout calculation: [(pre - delayed) / (pre - enhancement) = X%]. [Washout >60%: likely adenoma / Washout <60%: indeterminate or malignant]. Chemical shift MRI: [signal drop / no signal drop].

sections.name: Morphology
sections.content: Margin: [smooth / irregular]. Shape: [round / oval]. Internal characteristics: [homogeneous / heterogeneous / cystic / fatty]. Calcifications: [present/absent].

sections.name: Additional Findings
sections.content: Additional adrenal lesions: [present/absent]. [Contralateral gland: unremarkable / contains lesion]. [Retroperitoneal lymphadenopathy: present/absent]. [Liver: unremarkable / contains metastasis].

impression:
1. Incidental adrenal [lesion/nodule/mass] in [right/left] gland measuring [X]cm
2. Attenuation: [X]HU - [likely adenoma (benign) / indeterminate / concerning for malignancy]
3. [Washout: X% / Absolute washout: X% / Relative washout: X%]
4. [Follow-up in 6-12 months / MRI characterization / FDG PET / Biopsy / Surgical consultation] recommended
author: RadReport Templates
